title: Dashboard
dashboard_description: Track department request volume, today’s leave coverage, and the latest workflow activity from one place.
scope_description: Data is filtered automatically based on the signed-in role.
summary_description: Current-month request outcomes within your visible scope.
summary_pending_hint: Requests still waiting for HR_TIME_ATTENDANCE review.
summary_approved_hint: Approved and directly submitted requests this month.
summary_rejected_hint: Requests rejected during the current month.
calendar_description: Switch between monthly coverage and a weekly people list without leaving the dashboard.
calendar_hint: Click a day to inspect the employees recorded on that date.
recent_description: The 10 latest request records in your current scope.
